title: Once-in-a-lifetime planetary alignment, the Barbault Basket, in July 2026, has everyone talking about humanity's future: These 4 zodiac signs astrologers say could feel its biggest impact
description: A rare planetary alignment called the Barbault Basket will occur in July 2026. Astrologers believe this configuration signifies a major shift in human society. This event is expected to usher in a more cooperative and progressive global period. Technology and artificial intelligence will likely play a significant role in these changes. The alignment offers a symbolic turning point for collective reflection and positive transformation.
content:

title: Green says Mets fully compliant on AI after report of usage
description: Mets interim manager Andy Green said the club is fully compliant with Major League Baseball when asked about a report that singled out his organization for using artificial intelligence for in-game strategy decisions.
content:

title: ‘We are in the ugly duckling stage of AI,’ says Vineet Nayar, former CEO, HCL Technologies
description: Former HCL Technologies CEO and Sampark Foundation founder Vineet Nayar challenges the tech industry's obsession with artificial intelligence in his new book, Humans First, Machines Second.
content:
Your turnaround of HCL Technologies is credited to a people-first approach and became a case study at Harvard Business School. Years later, how do you think the philosophy remains relevant, especially in the AI era?

title: U.S. Grants UAE Expanded Access to Advanced AI Technology After Support in Iran Conflict
description: The U.S. Department of Commerce announced on July 10 that the United Arab Emirates (UAE) has been granted expanded access to advanced artificial intelligence (AI) technology without requiring an individual export license. According to officials, the decision recognizes the UAE’s support for U.S. national security interests, including its participation in Operation Epic Fury. Under the […]
content:
